allow: PowerShell($mem = "C:\\Users\\Khang\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Khang-Desktop-Final-Project-2\\memory"; if \(Test-Path $mem\) { Get-ChildItem $mem -Recurse | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Output "=== MEMORY.md ==="; if \(Test-Path "$mem\\MEMORY.md"\) { Get-Content "$mem\\MEMORY.md" -Raw } } else { Write-Output "No memory dir yet" })
